error: A Factorio process is already running; cannot transactionally isolate the pre-0.11 config path.
root_cause: PowerShell invocation of the Factorio GUI executable returned after proof output without synchronously owning the process through exit, leaving two 0.17 retention processes alive.
fix: Run Factorio through System.Diagnostics.Process with redirected output, an explicit timeout, WaitForExit, and owned-process-tree termination on timeout.
regression: Test-MIRPowerShellQuality requires the portable retention harness and its explicit process lifecycle primitives.
candidate_implication: All richer lower-target candidates require requalification and resealing from the advanced final dev anchor; no published version is affected.
cleanup_result: Stopped exactly the two workspace-owned 0.17 retention processes after command-line verification.
